THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS ANKIT SAHU AND PURVI A. SAHU AND AGAINST DEFENDANT KARENA APPLE FENG. THE RESIDENTIAL PURCHASE AGREEMENT AND JOINT ESCROW INSTRUCTIONS BETWEEN DEFENDANT KARENA APPLE FENG AND PLAINTIFFS ANKIT SAHU AND PURVI A. SAHU RELATED TO THE REAL PROPERTY 24 BOSWORTH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, 94112, ASSESSOR'S PARCEL NO. 6721-008 ("PURCHASE AGREEMENT") IS HEREBY CANCELED. THE PURCHASE AGREEMENT DOES NOT CONSTITUTE AN ENFORCEABLE CONTRACT TO PURCHASE THE SUBJECT PROPERTY 24 BOSWORTH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94112, ASSESSOR'S PARCEL NO. 6721-008. THEREFORE, DEFENDANT KARENA APPLE FENG DOES NOT HAVE ANY RIGHT TO PURCHASE 24 BOSWORTH UNDER THE PURCHASE AGREEMENT, NOR ANY CLAIM TO OWNERSHIP OVER 24 BOSWORTH. THE TITLE TO 24 BOSWORTH IS QUIETED IN PLAINTIFFS ANKIT SAHU AND PURVI A. SAHU. NO MONEY DAMAGES ARE REQUESTED.
COURT TRIAL ON AUG-22-2022 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE: MURLENE RANDLE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; RECORDED BY FOR THE RECORD (1:32PM-2:13PM) (514)

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar this day as regularly scheduled for continued court trial.
Judge: Murlene Randle; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by For The Record (1:32pm-2:13pm).
James Michael Matthews, Esq., and Ujvala Singh, Esq., appeared on behalf of Plaintiffs Ankit Sahu and Purvi Sahu, also present.
Defendant Karena Apple Feng did not appear.
Ankit Sahu is sworn and examined on his own behalf.
Court takes Judicial Notice of Plaintiff's Exhibits 11-22 and Plaintiff's Exhibits 1-22 are admitted into evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant.

The residential purchase agreement and joint escrow instructions between Defendant Karena Apple Feng and Plaintiffs Ankit Sahu and Purvi A. Sahu related to the real property 24 Bosworth Street, San Francisco, CA, 94112, Assessor's Parcel No. 6721-008 ("Purchase Agreement") is hereby canceled. The purchase agreement does not constitute an enforceable contract to purchase the subject property 24 Bosworth Street, San Francisco, California 94112, Assessor's Parcel No. 6721-008. Therefore, Defendant Karena Apple Feng does not have any right to purchase 24 Bosworth under the Purchase Agreement, nor any claim to ownership over 24 Bosworth. The title to 24 Bosworth is quieted in Plaintiffs Ankit Sahu and Purvi A. Sahu.
No money damages are requested.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2021 Set For Trial On Jul-25-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Text Ruling
